c0.label: safe_driving
c0.description: Driver is attentive, eyes on the road, and both hands on the steering wheel control surfaces.

c1.label: texting_right
c1.description: Driver is holding or interacting with a mobile device using their right hand.

c2.label: talking_phone_right
c2.description: Driver is holding a mobile device to their right ear, taking focus away from peripheral tracking.

c3.label: texting_left
c3.description: Driver is holding or interacting with a mobile device using their left hand.

c4.label: talking_phone_left
c4.description: Driver is holding a mobile device to their left ear.

c5.label: operating_radio
c5.description: Driver is manipulating dashboard elements, climate controls, or infotainment systems.

c6.label: drinking
c6.description: Driver is consuming a beverage, blocking their central visual field and removing a hand from the wheel.

c7.label: reaching_behind
c7.description: Driver is physically turning torso and reaching into the rear passenger or cargo space.

c8.label: hair_and_makeup
c8.description: Driver is adjusting hair, looking into the rearview vanity mirror, or applying cosmetics.

c9.label: talking_to_passenger
c9.description: Driver is turning head away from the forward path to engage socially with a passenger.
